string 2: {player}! Use this!

I fear this Digimon is unlike any we've encountered
previously.

Our job is to keep civilians safe from anomalies. We
can't afford to make any mistakes here.

This hostile is clearly more powerful than the other Digimon...
You are hereby authorized to use {fc9Cross Arts}.

Using the Digivice as a catalyst, focus the energy of your
Digimon on a single point and release it.

How well you can align the hearts of your allies all depends
on you, yourself.

All that we do, we do to protect humanity from anomalies.
On the honor of ADAMAS, we must persevere!
Yes... yes... Incredible...!

Huh... So it would seem there's more impact than previously
imagined... We're getting some excellent data...!
Amazing...! Amazing...! This will yield some truly invaluable data!

Good! Yes, that's it! Go on! They can take it! Show me
more. MORE, I tell you!
Next up!
The head turned this way...?

I don't like the look of this...! Focus your attacks on their
head and knock them off balance!
I'm sensing a buildup of power. Watch out for a counterattack!

Another attack, now?! But I guess that's all just part of
how they use their abilities...

We'd be wise to assume the enemy will get a final move in
at the end...!

There's always an opening right before a big move. A hard
hit where their power's focused should disrupt the attack!
Greymon, huh? I know their weak point!
And now... take this!

I'll make an opening for you! I'll set them up, and you knock
them down!

Here comes a big one! Put up your guard and defend
yourself!
Otherwise, they'll take you out in a single attack!

I can end you insects with a single blow! Behold the power
of the Titans!
Damn! It's like nothing we do can even scratch him!
The gate's gone haywire...? Is it because it's being forced open?
Come on! Things just keep getting worse and worse!
Why did they land?
What's... Going on?

There's a lot of power building up in those wings on the
head... We'd better do something!
Let's focus our attacks on those wings!
Parrotmon's power is increasing...?

But how...? Does that mean they get stronger during
battle...?
Screeeeeach!

Gah! We couldn't stop them! Brace yourselves... This is going
to be big!
Has the lightning stopped...?

Parrotmon seems to recover whenever they're struck by
lightning. There has to be some way to stop this...
The lightning stopped! Now's your chance!
Lightning, incoming!

Looks like you've made them very angry. Watch out
for that lightning!

Be careful! UltimateBrachiomon is resistant to {is28}{image(ui_icon_btlStatus_044)} physical
attacks!

New situation here! Resistance to {is28}{image(ui_icon_btlStatus_044)} physical attacks seems
to have weakened and resistance to {is28}{image(ui_icon_btlStatus_045)} magic attacks has increased.
Looks as if they gained resistance to {is28}{image(ui_icon_btlStatus_045)} magic attacks.

You can't have any more fight left in you, right? C'mon!
Just hear us out!

Who do you think I am? If something is broken, then I just
fix it!

So my previous arms were too big for you? Well, in that
case...

Not even that was enough to stop you, huh...? Well, then,
I'll make arms specially tuned to your abilities!
Perfection! Now you're finished!
Ugh, look what you've done!  This is all your fault!
The cockpit hatch is open!  Now's our chance!
No, I'm not finished yet!
Assess! Analyze! Evaluate!
Would you look at that! Seems like it's getting interesting!

Sorry to keep you waiting... That took longer than I'd
hoped.
As promised, I brought Submarimon.
Ooh, I smell a battle in the air! Just the way I like it!
Oh yeah, that's it! That's right! Keep it coming!

They're getting ready to charge! Aim for the head,
that seems to be the weak point!
They just keep coming...!
Ugh, come on, already...! Enough is enough!
This is an endurance contest now!

Maybe we can break through if we knock them all away
at once?
I shall deal with things here... Go... Head into the temple...

What was that?! Titamon struck before we knew what
was happening!

I can't explain at present just what happened! I'll analyze
the situation. You hang in there in the meantime!

Listen closely, Agent {player}. I have some analysis
results about your current predicament.

All signs indicate Titamon is stopping time. Normally, that
would be impossible... but with the treasure in his grasp...

Titamon likely charges up his power while time is stopped.
How can we counter that...?
Simmons here. Well, well... Just as I suspected!
We won't get another chance like this!

Use that EM net generator I gave you. I think you might
like the results!

You received a device from Dr. Simmons that generates a
special electromagnetic net, right?

Apparently, the electromagnetic net interferes with phase electrons.
It's worth giving it a try right before Titamon stops time.
AAAAAGH! What have you done?!
You have sealed my ability to stop time...!

Very well... Enough with this trickery. Now we shall see
what you are really made of!
GRAAAAAGH! Feel the fury of the Titans!

Darn! We couldn't stop it! Brace yourselves, everyone!
We've got to weather this!

They're too much to handle when they're in synch like
that... Slow 'em down by taking out SkullBaluchimon first!

What is it, SkullBaluchimon? Do not tell me you fear these
worms?

What are you afraid of, you foolish steed?! I will brook no
retreat! Fight! FIGHT!

It looks like they're compensating for each other's
elemental weaknesses...

...which means it's time to spoil their fun! Match the
element of my skill, everyone!

The battery can only be used once. I should focus on the
battle right now.

This bum's been causing all sorts of problems 'round
these parts lately. Everyone's at their wits' end.

And since you guys are here, it's a great opportunity to clean
house. It's been too long since I've gotten to fight.
Enough is enough. It's time to put these punks in their place.
They raised their body up! Looks like they're trying to end this!

Aim for that core thing in their mouth! I can sense massive
power coming from it!
GWAAAAAAAGH!
They're so fast! Hang in there, everyone!

Watch out for their physical counters! Use magic attacks
instead!
Darn! We botched it.

Looks like they put up a barrier that reflects magic!
Time for physical attacks!

We did it! They definitely felt that last attack! Now, what's
next...?

Magic isn't working...! Focus on their elemental weakness and
physical attacks!

Something seems different... Keep an eye out for their weak
points and physical counters!
Looks like that did the trick! Now, on to the next—

She's preparing to charge...! Power is building up in her
body!
MWAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA! It's over!

We made it! 
Let's take care of this one first!
Just in the nick of time! Oh, and you people...!
AAAGH! M-My back...!

There's a huge buildup of power in her left hand...! Focus
your attacks there!
Eee hee hee... I'm going to slice you to ribbons!
It's no use! Guard and hold on!
Hey! It's not bed time! Wake up!

There's a huge buildup of power in her left hand...! Focus
your attacks there!
It's no use! Guard and hold on!

I've got a bad feeling about this... Focus on the gun on
his right arm!
Guooooorgh!
Here comes a big one! Watch out, everyone!
Guooooorgh!

He sure is strong... and it seems like he gets stronger the
more we hurt him.
Big Bro...

I've got a bad feeling about this... Focus on the gun on
its right arm!
Here comes a big one! Watch out, everyone!

It sure is strong... and it seems like it gets stronger the
more we hurt it.
Critters, plants, and roadside pebbles—I love them all!
H-Hey, gimme a sec. I'm out of material...!
Whoa, whoa, WHOA, GLURP! Of all the times to run dry, glurp!
Agh, just when it's do or die, glurp... Oh, what gives, glurp?!
H-Hey, glurp... Somethin' bad's headed this way, glurp!

Lord Plutomon's mist is gone! But wait...
Those mouths...! And there are four of them?!
Uuuuuh...
Here comes a big attack! We're done for, glurp!

...Okay, whisper those sweet, sweet nothings to me—
a real cringe cliche so we can get the glurp outta here!

A weak-sauce empty compliment isn't going to cut it!
Now c'mon, hurry up! Give it to me like ya mean it!
I'm feelin' it now! Maybe I'll bust out my finest singin' voice!
Th-That mist... Lord Plutomon's power has run totally amok!

I can't bear to see him in such a state... That settles it!
I'm in it to win it now, glurp!
Glurp?! I never knew Lord Plutomon had a weak point... Glurp.

Glurp?! Whoa, seriously?! It's working!
It's actually glurping working! Not bad, glurp!

Whew! That was a close one, glurp... I nearly wet myself! 
If that'd hit us, we'd have been goners, glurp...
Glurp... Another big hit! We're getting worn down here, glurp...

He's trying to finish us off! Aim for the flame sphere!
That's where he gets his power from!
Bask now in the sun's gleaming light!

So that's the power of the sun... We gotta find a way to
ride it out!
The flame sphere has gained even more momentum!

Damn it! It wasn't supposed to go like this...
I guess the time has come to use "that."

Hehehe! Loaded! Now, take these Chrondigizoit Metal bullets
I developed!
Damn it all! The barrel couldn't withstand the recoil!
Rest forever in the frozen depths of the moon...
Such frigid air... Hold fast, my friends...!

Has the chill waned...? Aim for the moon! That's the
focal point of her power!
Has he fallen asleep?

The blessing of the temple has doubled his strength!
Pressing the attack now would not be wise...
Let's get out of here while he's still asleep!
Unh... Nnh...?

He'll take us all out in one go if we stay grouped up! 
Spread out! We have to scatter and flee!
Her power is converging... Aim for her crossed arms!
NOOOOOOO!
Here it comes! Get your guard up!

Did the power of the temple just grow...? This is almost
too much to bear!

Gegege! This party's just gettin' started! Now it's my
turn!
Hey, no fair! Lemme have some fun, too!
Now, this looks like a real party! Gimme a turn, bro!
I thought I told ya to stay back!

What a Digi-Monster... No way in hell I'm fightin' that
thing!
And Nani the who are you?
Aw man, I was JUST going to start tryin' a little harder too!
Whatever. Consider my buzz killed. No fightin' for me!
My apologies for keeping you waiting!

I detected this place because of a massive energy source
far beyond the ordinary...

...but I never would have suspected one of the Seven Great
Demon Lords. Luckily for us, it's a fake. Let's take it down!

You there, though I know not who you are! Don't just stand
there. Assist us!

Hah, you're kidding right? You think I stand a chance
against THAT monster?

The only thing that ever got me to move was momma's
smacks upside my head!

Owww! Okay yeah, that one kinda felt like one of momma's
love taps.
All right, fine! I'll help out!
Gahaha... It worked... My attack did some damage!
Ah, nicely done! Though I still know not who you are!
Gehehe... Just leave it to me, I got this!

My, my! One of the Seven Great Demon Lords! I had only ever
heard of them in rumors!

Even if this one is a fake... I'm sure this will be a difficult
fight all the same!

I will assist you! Oh, my fee? Well, consider this a
special freebie!

Allow me to join your fight! There's no way I'm gonna let you
guys outshine me!

I was bound to the Pillar of Time as punishment
from on high...

And now I am but a part of the System
that oversees the world.
While I am Chronomon...
...I am also the very laws of time themselves.
Regardless of my own will...

...as the System, I must eradicate you, 
the intruder.

Free me from these loathsome chains,
my alter ego.
For that is the reason you were born...

Surround Chronomon!
Start attacking at your discrection!

Once we prevail here... I'll throw the biggest
party anyone has ever seen!
I never thought I'd see this many allies at once.
It is all thanks to the Great Guardian.
Without him, we would not be here.

From the moment we met...
He's done nothing but help us.
All of us here owe him our gratitude.

The bonds that brought us together have now
woven themselves into a grand tapestry!

Great Guardian, you risked your life for the
sake of others.
And that... makes you a hero, beyond all doubt.

We stand beside you today because
we all will it so.
We cannot let you shoulder this burden alone!

After all that's happened... we can't turn a
blind eye!
You did so much for us...
You risked your life for others!
We must respond in kind!
The bonds we've forged led us to this point!
We shall wager our lives alongside yours...
...so that we may take the future for ourselves!

Our will to persevere burns on, no matter who
we face!

Hahaha! And I'm free to test out all these 
prototypes I've built!

The time to overcome our differences and
combine our might has come!

No one is going to die on my watch. My healing 
abilities will make sure of that.

Once we claim the future... I'll throw the party
to end all parties!

It's been a long road, but I know in my heart
this is our final battle!

On my pride as a Titan, I swear to emerge 
victorious!

Don't worry. The blessings of the land will 
keep us safe!

Time to use everything I learned from 
watching Big Bro!

Don't lose hope. Like a ray of moonlight piercing
through the darkest of nights.

We must succeed for the sake of those who
await us back home as well!

As the one who watched over you all these
years, I shall fight alongside you until the end.
No holding back now! Strike Roll!
Has Chronomon shifted stances?!
Have you sensed it, my alter ego?
The fervent wish to save the world...
The desire to change the course of fate...

...it all sends the world tumbling into a 
vortex of chaos.
Why? Because praying for a miracle...

...is nothing short of twisting the very precepts
of existence.
What pressure... What is he plotting?!

You made a prayer to change fate, to save the
one you hold dear...

...and, in doing so, gained the power
to interfere with time.

If two beings who govern time exist
simultaneously...
...chaos consuming the world is an inevitability!

Your very existence distorts the natural laws of
this world. Surely you know this?

Such was my grand design...! And now it has
come to fruition!

This hellscape cannot be contained until
"one of us ceases to exist!"
Thus, you have no choice but to fight!

This is...!! I shall bolster our defenses with 
the blessings of the land!

Taste despair. Feel the cruelty and irrationality 
of this world.
I will heal your injuries! No one shall fall under my watch!

As the embodiment of time itself... it is beyond
my power to destroy time.
So I created you. My alter ego.
And I have imparted my final gift... despair.

It was to fuel your hatred. Of this world and of your
destiny. It was to fill you with the impetus to destroy it all.
But... why?

That despair that bloomed within you...
Where did it go?
These tedious gnats flitting about in my gaze...
...did they offer you their hand in your darkest hour?

Did they corrupt you, with their falsehoods of hope? 
That you would stand a chance, if you fought together?
I shall shatter such deceit, here and now...!

Struggle against fate all you like. Know that some things
are inevitable.

It's heartless. Unfair. Unreasonable. But that is the world.
Fall once more into the darkness, forlorn of hope!
I will draw Chronomon's attention!

Slip around behind him and destroy 
his wings!
I cannot assist for a while...
Please, accept my healing powers!
Hrn?! Chronomon's wings... that's suspicious...

Allowing him to unleash another attack like that may prove
fatal!
Then we can't let that happen, can we?!
Aim for where his power is focused!
We'll handle one! You take care of the other!

Half measures will do nothing here! Strike 
with everything you can muster!
Thousand Fists!
Vortex Penetration!
Peace Fantasia!
Appropriate Works!
Be careful! I'm detecting a powerful energy reading from within Chronomon!
This energy surge... it's growing too fast!
Merukimon, you're the target! Watch out!
I'm taking a breather! You better not lose!

Curse you! I still had plenty of contraptions 
I wanted to try out!

Forgive us... It appears this is as far as we can
assist you...
This is the last bit of our strength. Take it.
I'm sorry... The rest is in your hands.
Not... like this... Apollo...mon... Diana...mon...

Damn, this guy's huge. Our attacks are barely
scratching him.

It appears those magic glyphs on its arms are
blocking our attacks.
Then we'll just have to smash them first!

Pecking away will get us nowhere. Fire off
everything you have all at once!
Needle Hive!
Cook of the Abyss!
Corona Sanctions!
Hell's Gate!
Another energy surge!
I'll stop it with a wall of ice!
And I shall assist! Use my power as well!

It was not enough... Is Dianamon safe...?
Yes...? Oh, good...
Junomon... You saved me...!

Damn it all! I'm finished... I don't have any 
strength left!
So this is how it ends... shameful..!

You'll have to handle the rest... but we entrust
the last of our power to you!
Miserable worms. You still insist on squirming?

Can you not grasp that your feeble hope is the very source
of your despair?

I am the world's time itself, and so, too, am I its cruel
irrationality.
Know the futility of your existence!
Chrono Devolution!
Use my fire and Dianamon's ice!

Though it won't make up for all the power 
you lost, it should help.

This is the moment of truth. My power is yours.
Do what you must to see this through!

I'll call forth the power sleeping inside me, the
same power as Chronomon's...

...the power to change the course of time! Stay strong
until I can!
Is everyone okay?
Just hold on a little longer!
I'm almost there... Hang on!
One last push! That's all I ask!
This is it! Thank you for holding out, everyone!

You should be teetering on the brink of the
abyss...

...and yet I sense not a drop of hatred in you
now. Why is this...?
Because of the bonds I've forged.
With those, the world isn't all that bad.
Inori... She lost her family to Digimon...

...but that didn't stop her from staying by my
side.
Inori didn't hate Digimon...!
She valued the future more than the past.

She kept her eyes forward and found hope 
in the world.
Valued the future more than the past...?

Do you not see that this way of thinking means
you are bound to the natural laws of the world?

Do not be swayed by cheap sentimentality.
Do not forget your hatred for this world...!

Tear the system asunder and become the 
destroyer you are destined to be!
I could never truly hate the world...
...because... because... I met Inori.
That alone was worth living for!

Chronomon... I don't suppose you ever made
any bonds like mine.
I... don't want to destroy the world.

No, I've come to fix it, to bring it back from the
brink of destruction.
Hurry! Time is running out!
Restore them to their former selves, quickly!

So we can break free from the past, and move 
forward, toward the future!

All of this tragedy... This chaos... It all stems from 
you! I'm going to defeat you and end it all!

Take this. My brother and sister left you
their strength.

Let's put an end to all this!
This is it, the final battle!
Ugh... My brother and sister are really showing up...
...so what's my excuse?!

I can't be calling myself their big sister with a 
performance like this...!
LOVE YOU!
Wave of Depth!
Spiritual Enchantment!
Pinpoint Weapon Works!
Graceful Lance!
Party of the Heavens!
Endless Surge!
Haggard Cluster!
Strike Roll!
Madness Merry-Go-Round!
Sol Blaster!
Phoebus Blow!
Good Night Moon!
Arrow of Artemis!
Island Freefall!
Burning Blood Shell!
I will heal you!
You must not fall.
Hnh!
Aww...
How do you like this?!
Hah!
It'll take more than that!
How annoying...!
I am with you!
There!
You cannot hit me!
How regrettable...
Which one should I try next...?
I have weapons for days!
Nrgh...
Shaaah!
Don't let your guard down.
Straight to the core!
Hyah!
Ungh...

Gahaha! Keep the drinks flowing! More! 
Bring me more!
Doryah!
Whoops, that was a little too close.
What a buzzkill...
Let's see how you like this move!
There!
It's not over yet! I'll surpass my limits!
Aaagh!
You shall know what it is to fear death!
Hmph. Pathetic.
Hrnh!
Blast...
I'm going all out!
Raaaaagh!
Daaah!
So annoying...!
Yaaaaaaah!
Daaah!
No, the sun will not set just yet!
Dammit!
Freeze!
*gasp*
Ice, shield me!
Tah!
A blast of flame for you!
Here I come!
Yah!
*sigh*

Now's our chance! I entrust you with my power!

Wh-What in the world are you doing?! I told you! It is not
possible!
Hey! That hurts! I cannot clear the fog right now!
Nothing you do will make a difference!
I cannot clear the fog...! It is just not possible!
Enough!
We're in trouble here! I think it's time for you-know-what!
Yeah! Here goes!
Yaaaaaaah!
Now, let the game resume!
I'm gonna make a huge hole with these great arms of mine!
I, Gallantmon, shall not allow that!
Huh?!
This is what I, Gallantmon, am truly capable of!
I am sorry to have kept you waiting!

My armor has been repaired perfectly! Let us fight together
from now on!

What am I supposed to do?! It is nearly impossible to
satisfy everyone!

Everyone is acting so selfishly! They should know what it
